title: eleocharis lankana
intro: Eleocharis lankana is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and protecting against oxidative stress. Eleocharis lankana can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its leaves and roots can also be used in traditional medicine preparations to harness its health benefits.
